# Sintra Signs

### Custom Sintra Signs

 

![Custom Sintra Sign for a Coffee Shop | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/sliderImages/826ee3ff4ba140fe953883da6e2d627d.jpg)

 

 

 

*   [Product Overview](#0ea1760a-fdae-45be-8518-32feeea62cc3)
*   [Customer Images](#74eaa9af-389c-4a9a-8871-f2e702f61ec1)

\*\* All sintra signs over 32" x 48" in any direction will be shipped via freight. To order sintra signs over 32" x 48", visit our [oversized flat shipping page](https://www.banners.com/oversized-signs-flat-shipping) or contact one of our customer service represetatives at: 320-391-5300. The maximum print size is 4' x 8'. \*\*

#### [Material](#materialCollapse)

### Sintra Sign Material

Sintra signs are printed on either a 3 mm or 6 mm thick material. Sintra is a rigid material and can be router-cut to any shape. Some common uses for sintra signs are advertising signage, business presentation displays, menus, promotional cutouts, sign frames and more. 

#### Printing

The signs are printed in full color with a full bleed, which means the color goes all the way to the edge of the sign. 

#### Sizes

All sintra signs over 32"x48" or any sign where the H + W is 81 inches or greater are shipped via freight. To order sintra signs over 32"x48", visit our [oversized flat shipping page](https://www.banners.com/oversized-signs-flat-shipping) or contact one of our customer service represetatives at: 320-391-5300. The maximum print size is 4'x8'.

#### Finishing Options

Standard finishing for Sintra signs is square cut. You may also select: 

• Square cut standard

• Shape cuts available when you work with a customer service representaitve

• Single or double sided signs

#### [Artwork](#artworkCollapse)

#### [Artwork Guidelines](#artwork-guidelinesCollapse)

Vector-based file types will print best, such as .eps— with fonts converted to outlines. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you.

#### [Artwork/Order Proofs](#artworkorder-proofsCollapse)

If you would like to double-check your order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork, a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval.

#### [Color Match Proof System](#color-match-proof-systemCollapse)

If your project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

#### [Production Times](#production-timesCollapse)

### Production Time Tables

We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your order.

#### **2 Business Days Express:**

Have an extra day, but still need your products quickly? The express option is ideal for you!

![2 Business Day Express Infographic](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-14-BANS-production time infographic-2 Business Days Express.jpg)

*   Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
*   Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
*   Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
*   Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

#### 3 Business Days Standard:

This is our most popular fast turnaround option. Free and speedy enough for almost any custom order.

![3 Business Day Standard Infographic](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-14-BANS-production time infographic-3 Business Days Standard.jpg)

*   Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
*   Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
*   Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
*   Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

#### 5 Business Days Saver:

If you’re not in a rush, then you can save some money by choosing our 5-Days Saver option.

![5 Business Day Saver](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-14-BANS-production time infographic-5 Business Days Saver.jpg)

*   Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
*   Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
*   Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
*   Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

#### [Payment](#paymentCollapse)

All banners must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards. We also accept checks, which must be received before your order is put into production. [For more information on check orders, see this article on our blog.](https://blog.banners.com/2013/05/online-orders-we-now-accept-checks.html).

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your order.

#### [Shipping](#shippingCollapse)

#### [General Shipping Guidelines](#general-shipping-guidelinesCollapse)

If you have any questions about shipping, please contact customer service at [(320) 391-5300](tel:13203915300) prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your order will be shipped via UPS Ground. We offer a 1–3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States.

**You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped.**

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders.

After products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the banner cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package.

Delays due to natural disasters or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the product is damaged in shipping, damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent.

Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7–10 business days after initial scheduled delivery. Please [visit our shipping information page](https://www.banners.com/shipping-info) for more information about our sintra sign shipping times.

**Banners.com ships throughout the United States and Internationally. Please note: all international shipments must have shipping labels as well as customs documentation provided by the customers. We will only accept international shipping labels from the following carriers, USPS, UPS, and FedEx. Contact a customer service rep today for more information.**

#### [Shipping Maps](#shipping-mapsCollapse)

**Sintra Signs**

This product is produced in our Minnesota facility only.

#### [Shipping Methods](#shipping-methodsCollapse)

We offer the following shipping methods:

Economy (5–10 Business Days )

Standard ( 3-5 Business Days )

Three Day (3 Business Days )

Two Day ( 2 Business Day )

Overnight (1 Business Day)

**Economy Shipping**

If choosing economy shipping please add in additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery.

Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5 - 10 days, depending on where the package is being shipped to.

**Did we answer all your questions?**

If not, please give us a call at [(320) 391-5300](tel:13203915300) and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you.

### Sintra Sign Samples

Here are some 6 mm Sintra Signs that we printed for customers.

#### Alex Brick & Stone Signs

![Sintra Sign for Alex Brick & Stone | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-8/Alex Brick & Stone Sign.jpg)

![Sintra Sign for Alex Brick & Stone | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-8/Alex Brick & Stone Sign 2.jpg)

![Sintra Sign for Alex Brick & Stone | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-8/Alex Brick & Stone Sign 3.jpg)

Custom sintra signs offer a durable yet eye-catching appearance that is printed on a 3 mm or 6 mm material that makes for an excellent indoor signage choice. These signs offer a full-color print, meaning that Sintra signs are perfect for advertising displays, menus, business-related presentations, promotions, and more. Due to their wide range of options, such as multiple sizes and options for double-sided printing, you can tailor your sintra sign to fit basically any location to help drive in foot traffic when you need it most.

[Not seeing the size you want? Click here and get a custom quote.](https://www.banners.com/sintra-signs/custom-sizes)

## More About Custom Sintra Signs [Return to Top](#top)

Commonly used for advertising signage, business presentation displays, menus and promotional cutouts, Sintra signs are both versatile and customizable. These signs are printed in full color with a full bleed, that means the color goes all the way to the edge of the sign. Sintra signs are more rigid than Styrene signs and this makes them more durable. Some other uses for sintra signs are router cutting, interior wall signage, and indoor display boards. You can easily display the Sintra signs using a stand or easel.

Our sintra signs are customizable in design, size and shape. Because of their great versatility, sintra signs are a swift solution for advertising signage needs. When you place your order, you will need to choose a size and a viewing distance. Our sintra signs range from 8”x12” to 32”x48.” You have three options for viewing distances; 3 feet, 5 feet and 10 feet.

### Three Easy Ways to Order Custom Sintra Signs

**Online Designer**

Create your own design using our online design tool. Customize your yard sign with background, clipart images, text or upload your own graphics.

**Upload a File**

Upload your own artwork (.eps, .pdf, .jpg). For more information, check out the Product Info tab above.

**Professional Designer**

Our team of professional graphic designers are able to create a custom design for you. Upload any artwork you want on your lawn sign and provide instructions for us.

## Frequently Asked Questions [Return to Top](#top)

### What are Sintra signs?

Sintra signs are rigid PVC signs (typically **3mm or 6mm thick**) designed mainly for indoor displays. They’re commonly used for restaurant signage, menus, and countertop or easel displays.

### What material are your Sintra signs printed on?

Our Sintra signs are printed on **3mm or 6mm rigid Sintra (PVC)**. They can also be router-cut to custom shapes.

### Can I order custom-shaped Sintra signs?

Yes—Sintra signs can be **router-cut to custom shapes** for logos, cutouts, and branded displays.

### Can Sintra signs be printed double-sided?

Yes—Sintra signs are available with **double-sided printing**.

### What colors are used to print Sintra signs?

Sintra signs are digitally printed in **full CMYK color**.

### Can I use Sintra signs outdoors?

Sintra signs are best for **indoor use** because they do not include a protective laminate and colors can fade with outdoor exposure. For outdoor signage, consider corrugated plastic options.

### How should I store Sintra signs?

Store Sintra signs flat in a dry, temperature-stable place to prevent warping and scratches. If your sign is double-sided, place protective sheets between signs during storage.

### What are common uses for custom Sintra signs?

Sintra signs are popular for **menus**, **presentation displays**, **promotional signage**, **cutouts**, and **sign frames** where you want a clean, rigid indoor sign.

### Can I request a proof before printing?

Yes—request a **PDF proof** to review before production, and printing begins only after you approve it.

### What production times do you offer, and when does turnaround start?

Production options range from **1–5 business days**, and turnaround starts after file upload is complete (or after **approval** if a proof is requested or prepress flags the order). Orders approved after **5:00 PM CST** are processed the next business day, and delivery time includes **production plus shipping**.

## Why Choose Banners.com?

**Customer Service**

Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

**Fast Turnaround**

Choose between a 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production time to complete your order on your schedule.

**Quality Products**

Our products are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology.

**Live Order Tracking**

Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system.
